workflow.name: CockroachDB Native Cluster HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate CockroachDB Native Cluster HA across existing member nodes with bash command steps.

data.label: Prepare CockroachDB Native Cluster HA node runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
log() { printf '[container-runtime] %s\n' "$*"; }
if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "docker is already installed"
  docker --version
  exit 0
fi
if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with apt"
  apt-get update
  DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with dnf"
  dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with yum"
  yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
else
  echo "Unsupported package manager. Install Docker manually." >&2
  exit 1
fi
systemctl enable --now docker
docker version

data.label: Render CockroachDB Native Cluster HA node configuration
data.command:
set -euo pipefail

log() { printf '[cockroachdb_native_cluster_ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
detect_current_ip() {
  for candidate in $(hostname -I 2>/dev/null); do
    case " 10.0.8.11 10.0.8.12 10.0.8.13 " in
      *" $candidate "*) printf '%s' "$candidate"; return 0 ;;
    esac
  done
  ip -o -4 addr show scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '{split($4,a,"/"); print a[1]; exit}'
}
CURRENT_IP="${OCTASTACK_NODE_IP:-$(detect_current_ip)}"
NODE_NAME="$(hostname -s)"
NODE_ROLE="unknown"
NODE_INDEX=0
case "$CURRENT_IP" in
  10.0.8.11) NODE_NAME='cockroachdb-01'; NODE_ROLE='cockroach'; NODE_INDEX=1 ;;
  10.0.8.12) NODE_NAME='cockroachdb-02'; NODE_ROLE='cockroach'; NODE_INDEX=2 ;;
  10.0.8.13) NODE_NAME='cockroachdb-03'; NODE_ROLE='cockroach'; NODE_INDEX=3 ;;
esac
if [ "$NODE_ROLE" = "unknown" ]; then
  log "unable to match current host IP ($CURRENT_IP) to the generated topology"
  exit 1
fi
log "running on $NODE_NAME ($CURRENT_IP, role=$NODE_ROLE)"

install -d -m 0750 /opt/octastack/cockroachdb_native_cluster_ha
install -d -m 0750 /var/lib/octastack/cockroachdb_native_cluster_ha
cat >/opt/octastack/cockroachdb_native_cluster_ha/.env <<EOF
OCTASTACK_SERVICE=CockroachDB
OCTASTACK_NODE_NAME=$NODE_NAME
OCTASTACK_NODE_ROLE=$NODE_ROLE
OCTASTACK_NODE_INDEX=$NODE_INDEX
CURRENT_IP=$CURRENT_IP
FIRST_NODE_IP=10.0.8.11
CLUSTER_PEERS=10.0.8.11,10.0.8.12,10.0.8.13
SEED_IPS=10.0.8.11,10.0.8.12,10.0.8.13

EOF
chmod 0600 /opt/octastack/cockroachdb_native_cluster_ha/.env

cat >/opt/octastack/cockroachdb_native_cluster_ha/compose.yml <<'COMPOSE'
services:
  cockroachdb:
    image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.2.0
    container_name: octastack-cockroachdb
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    env_file:
      - .env
    command: >
      start --insecure --advertise-addr=${CURRENT_IP} --listen-addr=0.0.0.0:26257 --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 --join=${CLUSTER_PEERS} --store=/cockroach/cockroach-data
    volumes:
      - data:/cockroach/cockroach-data
volumes:
  data: {}
COMPOSE
log "configuration rendered"

data.label: Deploy CockroachDB Native Cluster HA node
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
log() { printf '[cockroachdb_native_cluster_ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/cockroachdb_native_cluster_ha/compose.yml pull
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/cockroachdb_native_cluster_ha/compose.yml up -d
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/cockroachdb_native_cluster_ha/compose.yml ps
      log "node deployment complete"

data.label: Initialize CockroachDB Native Cluster HA node
data.command:
set -euo pipefail

log() { printf '[cockroachdb-native-cluster-ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
detect_current_ip() {
  for candidate in $(hostname -I 2>/dev/null); do
    case " 10.0.8.11 10.0.8.12 10.0.8.13 " in
      *" $candidate "*) printf '%s' "$candidate"; return 0 ;;
    esac
  done
  ip -o -4 addr show scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '{split($4,a,"/"); print a[1]; exit}'
}
CURRENT_IP="${OCTASTACK_NODE_IP:-$(detect_current_ip)}"
NODE_NAME="$(hostname -s)"
NODE_ROLE="unknown"
NODE_INDEX=0
case "$CURRENT_IP" in
  10.0.8.11) NODE_NAME='cockroachdb-01'; NODE_ROLE='cockroach'; NODE_INDEX=1 ;;
  10.0.8.12) NODE_NAME='cockroachdb-02'; NODE_ROLE='cockroach'; NODE_INDEX=2 ;;
  10.0.8.13) NODE_NAME='cockroachdb-03'; NODE_ROLE='cockroach'; NODE_INDEX=3 ;;
esac
if [ "$NODE_ROLE" = "unknown" ]; then
  log "unable to match current host IP ($CURRENT_IP) to the generated topology"
  exit 1
fi
log "running on $NODE_NAME ($CURRENT_IP, role=$NODE_ROLE)"

if [ "$NODE_INDEX" = "1" ]; then
  sleep 15
  docker exec octastack-cockroachdb cockroach init --insecure --host=127.0.0.1:26257 || true
fi

data.label: Document CockroachDB Native Cluster HA topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/cockroachdb_native_cluster_ha-topology.md <<'EOF'
# CockroachDB Native Cluster HA

Members:
- cockroachdb-01: 10.0.8.11 (cockroach)
- cockroachdb-02: 10.0.8.12 (cockroach)
- cockroachdb-03: 10.0.8.13 (cockroach)

Three CockroachDB members run a native replicated SQL cluster with deterministic join addresses and first-member initialization.
EOF
cat /tmp/cockroachdb_native_cluster_ha-topology.md

data.label: Validate CockroachDB Native Cluster HA node
data.command: docker exec octastack-cockroachdb cockroach node status --insecure --host=127.0.0.1:26257

data.label: CockroachDB Native Cluster HA health check
